name: Blackstone Secured Lending Fund
summary: PART I . Our Company Blackstone Secured Lending Fund (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, the Company, we, us, or our ), is a Delaware statutory trust formed on March 26, 2018, and structured as an externally managed, non-diversified, closed-end management investment company. On October 26, 2018, the Company elected to be regulated as a business development company ( BDC ) under theInvestment Company Act of 1940, as amended (together with therules and regulations promulgated thereunder,...
